evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: Create test cases for data accuracy
evidence.domain_risk: secure multi-cloud platform for content security and governance
evidence.jd_authorship: Develop dbt semantic layer architecture; Collaborate across departments on data strategy
evidence.autonomy_level: Create test cases for data accuracy
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: Design and build data transformation pipelines; Address data quality issues
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: Designing and building new pipelines is paired with addressing data quality issues in existing systems, combining greenfield and fix/scale responsibilities.
evidence.ai_role_explanation: Semantic layer infrastructure enables AI consumption (text-to-SQL, GenAI patterns).
evidence.testing_framing: Create test cases for data accuracy
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: Candidate owns quality practice through explicit test case creation.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing: secure multi-cloud platform for content security and governance
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: Governance and security dominance signals compliance/trust-driven framing over operational reliability.
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: Multiple rigour signals (CI/CD, test cases, data accuracy, documentation) with no velocity signals present.
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: Content governance and security are business-critical but lack explicit financial reporting, regulatory, or compliance language indicating high risk.
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: Named tools (dbt, BigQuery, CI/CD) appear in responsibilities suggesting existing infrastructure being improved and extended rather than built from zero.
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Specific technical responsibilities (dbt semantic layer, transformation pipelines, CI/CD) mixed with generic boilerplate (collaborate, document).
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: The bulk of responsibilities focus on building data infrastructure and semantic layers for consumption by other data consumers rather than external business or GTM stakeholders.
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: The responsibilities are focused on delivering specific technical outputs and managing defined processes within scope rather than setting overall direction or strategy.
